name: Heretic's Sutra
additional_info: Grants a Talent tool that drains the user's sanity on proc. If your sanity is above 80%, it will be set to 65% on use. If your sanity is below 80%, it will be reduced by 15% on use. Passively procs Shared Misery and Piercing Will for 15 seconds. The cooldown and windup of Heretic's Sutra scale on your Willpower investment, but the scaling is largely negligible.
desc: A chant that steers you into the state of Insanity for 20 seconds.
